lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: Welcome to the Mining Guild. My name's Gadrin and I'm the Guildmaster. Can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: All sorts of things! There's plenty of coal rocks along with some iron, mithril and adamantite as well.

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: Deeper in the guild you'll find even more rocks including some runite! The best bit though is our amethyst mine, the only one in the land!

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: There's no better mining site anywhere!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you dwarves do with the ore you mine?

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: What do you think? We smelt it into bars, smith the metal to make armour and weapons, then we exchange them for goods and services.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't see many dwarves selling armour or weapons here.

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: No, this is only a mining outpost. We dwarves don't much like to settle in human cities. Most of the ore is carted off to Keldagrim, the great dwarven city. They've got a special blast furnace up there - it makes

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: smelting the ore so much easier. There are plenty of dwarven traders working in Keldagrim. Anyway, can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your skillcape?

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: Sure, this is a Skillcape of Mining. It shows my stature as a master miner! It has all sorts of uses including a skill boost to my Mining skill and a chance of mining extra ores. When you get to level 99 come and talk to

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: me and I'll sell you one.

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I believe I can buy a Skillcape of Mining from you?

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: You believe right, miner. You have earned the right to wear one and when you do you'll have a small chance of finding an extra ore, but I'll need 99000 coins from you first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, that's overpriced.

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: I'm sorry you feel that way; come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Gadrin
lines.text: Thanks very much, master miner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'm fine.
